basic_details.job_title: Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa Recruitment 2026: Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa has released the official notification for 4 Lecturer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 15-06-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Physics with First Class or Equivalent at Bachelor's or Master's level from a recognised University or Institute, Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognised University with First Class or Equivalent, Bachelor's degree in Textile Manufacturing Technology from a recognised University with First Class or Equivalent
qualification.details: Lecturer in Physics: Master's Degree in Physics with First Class or Equivalent at Bachelor's or Master's level from a recognised University or Institute. Lecturer in Electrical Engineering: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognised University with First Class or Equivalent. Lecturer in Textile Manufacturing Technology: Bachelor's degree in Textile Manufacturing Technology from a recognised University with First Class or Equivalent.

salary_details.details: Lecturer in Physics: Rs. 50,000/- Per Month Lecturer in Electrical Engineering: Rs. 50,000/- Per Month Lecturer in Textile Manufacturing Technology: Rs. 50,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: ddd.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa Lecturer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Lecturer posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Lecturer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Lecturer position across various disciplines as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post. For Physics, a Master's degree is required. For Electrical Engineering and Textile Manufacturing Technology, a Bachelor's degree with First Class is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Lecturer posts is 35 years as of 15th June 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Lecturer position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month for the Lecturer posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Lecturer posts will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their qualifications and application will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the administration, which is www.dnh.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates as specified in the official notification.
